note: Blog ships only default config (a content type + Views) and implements a few hooks; it has no settings form. All cases are `recipe` (response-graded), probing the content model, the View routes/paths, the permission model, the services/helper API, and the uninstall behavior.

evals.prompt: After enabling the Drupal Blog module, what content type does it create and which fields does that type include?
evals.expected_output: It creates the `blog_post` ("Blog post") node type with a Body field, a Blog comments comment field (field_blog_comments), and an unlimited Blog tags taxonomy reference field (field_blog_tags).

evals.prompt: On a Drupal site with the Blog module, what URL shows all blog posts site-wide, and what URL shows a single user's blog?
evals.expected_output: All posts are at /blog (View display blog_all, route view.blog.blog_all); a single user's posts are at /blog/{uid} (display blog_user_all, route view.blog.blog_user_all, param arg_0 = uid).

evals.prompt: Where does the Blog module expose an RSS feed of all blog posts, and where is the per-user RSS feed?
evals.expected_output: All-posts feed at /blog/feed (display feed_1); per-user feed at /blog/{uid}/feed (display feed_2).

evals.prompt: Where is the admin settings form for the Drupal Blog module?
evals.expected_output: There is none — Blog ships no *.routing.yml and its info.yml `configure` is null. It only installs default config (content type + Views); configuration is done via the standard node type, field, Views, and block UIs.

evals.prompt: I want to let only a specific role write blog posts with the Drupal Blog module. Which permission do I grant, and does the module define its own permissions?
evals.expected_output: Grant the standard node bundle permission `create blog_post content`. Blog defines no permissions of its own (no permissions.yml); it relies entirely on node bundle permissions for blog_post.

evals.prompt: In Drupal Blog module code, which helper function counts published blog posts, and how do I count them for just one user?
evals.expected_output: Call blog_post_counter(): with no argument it returns the count of all published blog_post nodes; pass a user object (blog_post_counter($account)) to scope the count to that author via a uid condition.

evals.prompt: Which service in the Drupal Blog module builds a "{username}'s blog" title, and what method do I call?
evals.expected_output: The blog.lister service (Drupal\blog\BlogLister); call userBlogTitle($user) with a UserInterface to get a TranslatableMarkup "@username's blog".

evals.prompt: Why won't the Drupal Blog module uninstall, and how do I make it uninstallable?
evals.expected_output: Its uninstall validator (blog.uninstall_validator) blocks uninstall while any blog_post nodes exist (blog_post_counter() != 0). Delete all Blog Post content first, then uninstall.
